title: PAIK Component
description: A deployable/runnable unit of the project (a service, library, or job). Its repository, API, external services, secrets location, and ticket scopes are `links[]` entries rather than dedicated fields - see SPEC.md section 5.

depends_on.description: Ids of other components this one depends on

environments.description: Relative links to the environment document(s) this component is deployed to
